response:
<<The Palindrome of the Sky>>  
SELECT title, director  
FROM movies  
ORDER BY LENGTH(title) DESC, LENGTH(director) DESC;

This query sorts the records by the length of the `title` in descending order, and if titles have the same length, it sorts by the length of the `director` in descending order. A palindrome, such as "abba", is included in the response as a demonstration of a word that reads the same forward and backward.
